heading: Submission of agreements
label: 1961 Submission of agreements
text: Any agreement concluded with the Government of Palau pursuant to this joint resolution including the agreement entitled “Agreement Concerning Special Programs related to the Entry into Force of the Compact of Free Association Between the Government of the United States and the Government of the Republic of Palau” signed on , and any agreement which would amend, change, or terminate any such agreement, or portion thereof, shall be submitted to the Congress and may not take effect until after 30 days after the date on which such agreement is so submitted. An amendment or agreement substituting or in addition to the subsidiary agreement negotiated under section 212(a) of the Compact or its annex shall take effect only when approved by an Act of Congress.May 26, 1989
notes: References in TextThis joint resolution, referred to in text, is , , , which enacted this part and sections 1846 and 1972 of this title, amended sections 1615 and 1933 of this title and , Crime Control and Law Enforcement, and enacted provisions set out as a note under , Public Printing and Documents. For complete classification of this joint resolution to the Code, see Tables.Pub.
